rationale: No direct legal conflict. Increasing the homestead exemption may indirectly reduce local school district property tax revenue referenced in Subsection (d)(3)(D), but the statutory requirement—80% of whatever funding a district is entitled to—remains operable regardless of the exemption amount.
quote: developing and exercising final approval of pathway budgets, which must include at least 80 percent of the state and local funding to which each partnering school district is entitled under Sections 48.106, 48.110, and 48.118
_note: Any fiscal impact on R-PEP partnerships is indirect through school finance formulas in Educ. Code §§48.106, 48.110, and 48.118, which are not part of the rule text under review.
